alumite.setting.hud_editor.title: HUD Editor
alumite.setting.shell.title: Alumite
alumite.setting.shell.profile_delete_pop: Are you sure you want to delete "%s"? This cannot be undone.
alumite.setting.shell.profile_rename_pop: Choose a unique name for this profile.
alumite.setting.shell.profile_popup_desc: Give your profile a name, and optionally start from the current defaults.
alumite.setting.shell.profile_name_error: A profile with that name already exists.
Another profile already uses that name.
alumite.setting.shell.global_hud_apply_a: Applies this setting to every widget at once.
alumite.social.title: Social
alumite.social.dm.title: Direct Messages
alumite.social.error.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
alumite.setting.shell_open_keybind.descr: Opens or closes the HUD editor.
alumite.setting.social_keybind.descripti: Opens or closes the social menu.
alumite.setting.show_self_nameplate.desc: Displays your name tag above your own character.
alumite.setting.show_server_list_in_paus: Adds a server list button to the pause menu.
alumite.setting.confirm_disconnect.descr: Requires a second click before disconnecting from a server.
alumite.setting.turbo_entities.descripti: Improves performance by skipping rendering of entities outside your view.
alumite.setting.turbo_particles.descript: Improves performance by skipping rendering of particles outside your view.
alumite.setting.social_notifications.des: Disables pop-up notifications for social features.
alumite.module.hud_background_color.desc: The background color of HUD panels.
alumite.module.hud_border_color.descript: The outline color of HUD panels.
alumite.module.hud_padding.description: The spacing between a HUD panel's edge and its content.
alumite.module.text_shadow.description: Draws a drop shadow behind HUD text.
alumite.module.remove_min_width.descript: Allows compact MiniMessage HUD panels to shrink below their default minimum width.
alumite.module.fogcustomizer.atmospheric: Controls how thick the fog appears in the Overworld. Set to 0 to disable.
alumite.module.scoreboard.hide_scoreboar: Hides the numeric scores on the sidebar scoreboard.
alumite.module.particlefilter.toggle.des: When off, particles of this type are hidden.
alumite.module.soundfilter.toggle.descri: When off, this sound is muted.
alumite.module.status_effects.show_ampli: Shows the strength level of each effect, such as II or III.
alumite.module.status_effects.show_durat: Shows how much time remains on each effect.
alumite.module.status_effects.flash_time: How many seconds before expiry an effect starts flashing. Set to 0 to disable.
Sort effects by time remaining, or alphabetically by name.
alumite.module.status_effects.display_mo: Show effects in a compact single row, or an expanded two-line view.
alumite.module.titles.scale_title_and_su: Adjusts the size of title and subtitle text.
alumite.module.movement.smooth_mouse_loo: Adds smoothing to camera movement when looking around.
alumite.module.movement.enable_flight_sp: Enables a custom speed multiplier while flying.
alumite.module.movement.flight_speed_mod: How fast you fly relative to the default speed.
alumite.module.music.legacy_music_only.d: Restricts background music to legacy-era vanilla tracks. Biome soundtracks are redirected to the game channel and newer additions are skipped.
alumite.module.music.continue_music_afte: Keeps the current track playing when you disconnect from a server or return to the title screen.
alumite.module.zoom.zoom_key.description: The key that activates zoom while held.
alumite.module.zoom.zoom_level.descripti: How much to zoom in by default.
alumite.module.zoom.scroll_to_zoom.descr: Allows the scroll wheel to adjust the zoom level while zoomed in.
alumite.module.zoom.smooth_zoom.descript: Animates the zoom transition instead of snapping instantly.
alumite.module.freelook.freelook_key.des: Hold this key to look around without turning your character.
alumite.module.tab.ping_mode.description: Controls how your latency is shown in the player list.
alumite.module.tab.colored_ping.descript: Colors ping values in the player list based on connection quality.
alumite.module.tab.max_player_slots.desc: Limits how many players are shown in the player list at once.
alumite.module.tps.show_mspt.description: Shows milliseconds per tick alongside TPS.
alumite.module.tps.use_tps_color.descrip: Colors the TPS display based on server performance.
alumite.module.cps.split_mouse_buttons.d: Shows click speed for the left and right mouse buttons separately.
alumite.module.coordinates.layout.descri: Stack coordinate axes vertically, or show them all on one row.
alumite.module.coordinates.block_precisi: How many decimal places to show for your coordinates.
alumite.module.background.description: Draws a background panel behind HUD elements.
alumite.module.rounded_corners.descripti: Rounds the corners of HUD background panels.
alumite.module.rounding_radius.descripti: How rounded the corners of HUD panels are.
alumite.module.show_border.description: Draws an outline around HUD panels.
alumite.module.border_thickness.descript: How thick the outline around HUD panels appears.
alumite.module.armor_hud.show_head.descr: Displays your helmet in the equipment display.
alumite.module.armor_hud.show_chest.desc: Displays your chestplate in the equipment display.
alumite.module.armor_hud.show_legs.descr: Displays your leggings in the equipment display.
alumite.module.armor_hud.show_feet.descr: Displays your boots in the equipment display.
Displays your main-hand item in the equipment display.
alumite.module.armor_hud.show_off_hand.d: Displays your off-hand item in the equipment display.
alumite.module.armor_hud.show_off_hand_n: Places your off-hand item to the left of your main-hand row instead of on its own row.
alumite.module.armor_hud.hide_unbreakabl: Hides durability numbers on items that cannot break.
alumite.module.armor_hud.show_total_item: Shows how many of a held item you have across your entire inventory, not just the current stack.
alumite.module.armor_hud.show_item_stack: Shows the byte size of the held item's NBT data on the HUD.
alumite.module.armor_hud.color_armor_dur: Colors armor durability values based on how much is remaining.
alumite.module.armor_hud.color_main_hand: Colors held item durability based on how much is remaining.
alumite.module.armor_hud.color_off_hand_: Colors off-hand item durability based on how much is remaining.
alumite.module.clock.clock_format.descri: The date and time format shown by the clock widget.
alumite.module.ping.use_ping_color.descr: Colors your ping based on connection quality.
Colors the CPU display based on current usage.
alumite.module.fps.show_one_percent_lows: Shows your 1%% low FPS alongside your current framerate.
alumite.module.fps.show_point_one_percen: Shows your 0.1%% low FPS alongside your current framerate.
Shows skipped entity and particle counts as a ratio or a percentage.
alumite.setting.reduce_mac_os_resolution: Lowers the rendering resolution on macOS to improve performance.
alumite.module.bossbar.hide_bar.descript: Hides the boss health bar, showing only the name.
alumite.module.hypixel.auto_gg.descripti: Automatically sends "gg" in chat when a game ends.
alumite.module.hurtcam.cancel_hurtcam_an: Stops the camera from shaking when you take damage.
alumite.module.blockoutline.show_outline: Draws an outline around the block you're looking at.
alumite.module.blockoutline.outline_colo: The color of the block outline.
alumite.module.blockoutline.show_block_c: Fills the targeted block with a color overlay.
The color used to fill the targeted block.
alumite.module.timechanger.world_time.de: Sets the time of day shown client-side.
alumite.module.inventorytweaks.quick_mov: Hold Shift and drag across slots to quickly move multiple items without clicking each one.
alumite.module.inventorytweaks.scroll_mo: Scroll over a slot to instantly move that item to the other inventory.
alumite.module.inventorytweaks.auto_swap: Automatically switches to the next matching tool in your hotbar when your current one breaks.
alumite.module.fogcustomizer.water_fog.d: Controls how thick the fog appears underwater. Set to 0 to disable.
Controls how thick the fog appears in the Nether. Set to 0 to disable.
alumite.module.fogcustomizer.end_fog.des: Controls how thick the fog appears in the End. Set to 0 to disable.
alumite.module.speed.include_vertical.de: Counts vertical movement when calculating your speed.
alumite.module.speed.show_peak.descripti: Shows the highest speed reached in the last second.
alumite.module.speed.show_average.descri: Shows your average speed over the last second.
alumite.module.itemtooltip.gap_above_inf: Adds a blank line between the item name and extra info lines in tooltips.
alumite.module.itemtooltip.show_item_siz: Shows the byte size of an item's data in its tooltip.
alumite.module.process_memory.memory_for: The format used to display memory usage.
alumite.module.waypoints.create_waypoint: Creates a waypoint at your current position.
alumite.module.waypoints.show_beam.descr: Renders a colored beam at each waypoint location.
alumite.module.waypoints.label_on_look.d: Only shows the waypoint label when you're looking near it.
alumite.module.waypoints.show_border.des: Draws a colored border around the waypoint label.
alumite.module.waypoints.label_padding.d: Controls the padding around waypoint name labels.
alumite.module.waypoints.death_points.de: Automatically creates a waypoint at your death location.

alumite.module.blur.blur_strength.descri: How strong the background blur appears when a screen is open.
alumite.module.blur.animation_enabled.de: Smoothly fades the blur in and out when opening or closing a screen.
alumite.module.blur.animation_speed.desc: How long the blur fade takes when opening or closing a screen, in milliseconds.
